title: (Just Like) Starting Over
meaning_summary: Starting Over retains value because it sits at the intersection of legacy pop nostalgia, artist biography, and long-tail playlist familiarity.
revenue_drivers: Biography-driven interest keeps the song relevant beyond ordinary catalog fade.
Legacy pop playlists and recurrent radio memory support steady replay value.
Catalog depth around major cultural figures tends to monetize even outside the single biggest song.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes durable nostalgia listening, continued catalog relevance, and moderate publishing-side participation.

ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and estate-side publishing participation assumed
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No new catalog sale adjustment assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled from the behavior of secondary-but-still-recognized songs in a globally famous solo catalog.
